results.title: McKnight’s Senior Living wins top honors for print magazine
results.description: McKnight’s Senior Living has captured a Grand Award and an Award of Excellence in the 2023 Awards for Publication Excellence program.

results.title: McKnight’s Senior Living named top website covering assisted living for industry professionals
results.description: McKnightsSeniorLiving.com has been named the top business-to-business website covering the assisted living industry.

results.title: McKnight’s Senior Living wins top awards for magazine, columns
results.description: McKnight's Senior Living won the top award for a trade magazine, and Editor Lois Bowers won the top award for a business-to-business columnist at the 2023 Ohio’s Best Journalism competition.

results.title: McKnight’s Senior Living wins 4 awards for editorial excellence
results.description: Excellence in coverage of news of importance to senior living providers resulted in four awards from the American Society for Business Publication Editors for McKnight’s Senior Living editors and contributors last week.
